# Repo Auth Entra Skill

## Status

This variant intentionally excludes API auth/security enforcement.

## Use When

- Only when auth is explicitly reintroduced in a future branch/variant.

## Primary References

- N/A for this variant.

## Rules

1. Prefer `repo-architecture`, `repo-testing`, `repo-observability`, `repo-azure-deploy`, or `repo-doc-sync` for active tasks in this codebase.
